steel_chestplate.title: Craft a TFMG Steel Chestplate or full Steel armor set

subtitle.text: The factory makes armor. Wear what you make.

description: TFMG Steel armor sits between iron and diamond.
Better protection. Requires the Industrial Blast Furnace path.
The engineering cost is the upgrade cost.
Each one requires Steel Ingots from the IBF chain.
You have the factory. You have the ingots.
Dress accordingly for what comes after the oil age.
The next chapters involve things that require more than iron.
Armor up before you go looking.
→ Craft a TFMG Steel Chestplate or full armor set [check]
